name: RETRACTABLE TECHNOLOGIES INC
business: Retractable Technologies, Inc. manufactures and markets safety medical products, primarily syringes and needles, for the healthcare industry. The company sells to healthcare providers domestically and internationally. Its dominant revenue-generating products are injection devices under the VanishPoint, Patient Safe, and EasyPoint brands.

exposures.sentence: Our business is the manufacturing and marketing of safety medical products (predominately syringes) for the healthcare industry.

Tariffs are expected to have a continuing material impact on our ability to source finished goods and certain raw materials and component parts, and to our results of operations and financial position.

catalysts.event: Commercial availability of domestically produced 0.5 mL syringes
catalysts.sentence: We currently anticipate that commercial quantities will become available, as market demand necessitates, in the second half of 2026.
